## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential Series B investment partnership between GrowthX and PROOF Fund](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has built an AI-powered content marketing platform + expert marketplace, delivering end-to-end services for major brands](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Strong traction: $11M ARR, 70%+ gross margins, 100% conversion on new 8-week strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Seeking strategic Series B partner to accelerate growth; evaluating raise vs. bootstrapping given strong unit economics](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
  - [PROOF interested in further diligence and making customer introductions to expand GrowthX's reach beyond B2B tech](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [AI workflow engine as code powers content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Context engineering and knowledge graph enable high-quality, brand-aligned outputs](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop for quality control and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [End-to-end execution from strategy to publishing and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Expanding to expert marketplace model to scale further](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Business Model & Traction

  - [$9K-230K monthly contracts based on work streams (e.g. editorial, programmatic, landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1997.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint model driving 100% conversion rate](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [$11M ARR, 70%+ gross margins trending up](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2440.0)
  - [Key clients: Ramp, Webflow, Sentinel One, Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2395.0)
  - [No direct competition; replacing fragmented agency/freelancer setups](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1863.0)

### Team & Background

  - [Founder Marcel built organic growth engines at IBM, HP, HashiCorp](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [CTO Daniel from Basecamp, built distributed infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Hiring ex-CTOs and principal engineers from top tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Funding & Growth Strategy

  - [$3M spent to date, $9M still in bank](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Evaluating Series B to accelerate growth vs. bootstrapping](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
  - [Seeking strategic partner aligned with vision beyond typical SaaS metrics](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2132.0)
  - [Goal to expand beyond B2B tech into broader enterprise/consumer markets](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)

### PROOF Fund Interest

  - [Impressed by traction, unit economics, and blue-chip client base](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
  - [Interested in further diligence and making customer introductions](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)
  - [See potential to help expand GrowthX's reach beyond current network](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share data room access with PROOF team](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2803.0)
  - [PROOF to explore customer introductions, particularly outside B2B tech](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2810.0)
  - [Schedule technical deep dive with GrowthX CTO if needed](https://fathom.video/share/Z333sRfbVem1A13zQCtUPfyyc8eBSYyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2803.0)
